name: Ironhold Quarry
identity: Major Roazian extraction site linked to law, labor, and strategic infrastructure.
approach: Severe extraction landscape with visible labor discipline and transport controls.
inside: Ore flows, guarded labor, and infrastructure support make the quarry a blunt expression of Roazian order.
expected_behavior: obey labor zones and guard instructions
faith: Low-ornament discipline and civic necessity dominate.
